properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are the King of kings, Creator of everything. Yet You gave up your Son Your only one To pay the price for my sin.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: What more can I ask from You? In whom will I trust but You? You're the lamp to my feet, You're all I need. In Your presence I will sing.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I give You my all. Take full control. I lay down my life before Your throne. I thank You, my Lord, You made me Your own. And today I will say that this world is no longer my home.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I surrender to You my life, A living sacrifice. Whatever I do, I do it for You. May Your Name be glorified.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: At times I stumble and fall. Still You hear me when I call. Your mercies are new every morning. When I'm weak you make me strong.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Hmmmmmm….. This world is not my home.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I give You my all. Take full control. I lay down my life before Your throne. I thank You, my Lord, You made me Your own. And today I will say that this world is no longer my home. And today I will say that this world is no longer my home. And today I will say that this world is no longer my home.
